name: init
description: Interactive wizard to initialise Pacifica CLI: set wallet private key, network, default leverage, and slippage. Run once per machine. Not suitable for automated execution.

name: scan
description: Scan all Pacifica markets for trading opportunities. Returns market price, 24h change, volume, and funding rate for every listed market.

parameters.name: --min-volume
parameters.description: Filter markets below this 24h volume in USD

parameters.name: --json
parameters.description: Output JSON array of market objects

name: trade.buy
description: Place a long (buy) order on Pacifica DEX. Maps to side=bid on-chain. Prompts for confirmation in interactive mode; guardrail system controls autonomous execution.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Position size in base asset (e.g. 1 for 1 SOL)

name: trade.sell
description: Place a short (sell) order on Pacifica DEX. Maps to side=ask on-chain. Same options as trade.buy.

name: orders
description: List all open orders for the configured wallet.

parameters.name: --json
parameters.description: Output JSON array of order objects

name: orders.cancel
description: Cancel a specific open order by integer order ID. Dangerous — irreversible.

parameters.name: orderId
parameters.description: Numeric order ID from orders list

name: orders.cancel-all
description: Cancel all open orders, optionally filtered to a single market symbol. Prompts for confirmation unless --json is present. Dangerous — irreversible.

parameters.name: symbol
parameters.description: Optional symbol to limit cancellation scope e.g. SOL-USDC-PERP

parameters.name: --json
parameters.description: Output JSON { cancelled, cancelledCount, symbol } and skip interactive confirmation

name: positions
description: List all open positions enriched with current mark price, unrealized PnL in USD and percent, and liquidation price.

parameters.name: --json
parameters.description: Output JSON array with markPrice, pnlUsd, pnlPercent fields

name: positions.close
description: Close an open position at market price using a reduce-only order. Prompts confirmation when margin exceeds $1,000. Dangerous — submits to chain.

parameters.name: symbol
parameters.description: Market symbol of the position to close e.g. SOL-USDC-PERP

name: heatmap
description: Display an ASCII heatmap of position risk across all open positions. No JSON output — use positions --json for machine-readable data.

parameters.name: --compact
parameters.description: One-line-per-position compact view instead of bar chart

name: journal
description: View trade history and P&L from the Pacifica API. Defaults to the last 100 trades.

parameters.name: --weekly
parameters.description: Daily P&L breakdown for the last 7 days

parameters.name: --monthly
parameters.description: Weekly P&L breakdown for the last 30 days

parameters.name: --json
parameters.description: Output JSON array of trade history objects

name: journal.export
description: Export trade history to a CSV or JSON file with optional date range and symbol filters.

name: funding
description: Show current and predicted funding rates for all Pacifica markets, sorted by absolute APR. Rates settle every 8 hours. APR = rate × 3 × 365.

parameters.name: --json
parameters.description: Output JSON array of { symbol, fundingRate, nextFundingRate, price }

name: simulate
description: Simulate a trade: compute liquidation price, P&L at 6 price scenarios (±5/10/20%), and funding cost projections for 8h/24h/7d. Optionally checks for matching intelligence signals. Never submits orders.

parameters.name: market
parameters.description: Market symbol e.g. SOL, SOL-USDC-PERP, ETH

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Position size in USD notional value

parameters.name: --entry
parameters.description: Override entry price (default: current mark price)

parameters.name: --json
parameters.description: Output JSON with all computed fields

name: alerts.list
description: List all configured price and funding alerts with their current status.

parameters.name: --json
parameters.description: Output JSON array of alert objects

name: alerts.add
description: Add a new price or funding alert. Exactly one condition flag is required.

parameters.name: --above
parameters.description: Trigger when price rises above this value

parameters.name: --below
parameters.description: Trigger when price falls below this value

parameters.name: --funding-above
parameters.description: Trigger when funding rate exceeds this value (raw decimal, e.g. 0.0005)

parameters.name: --funding-below
parameters.description: Trigger when funding rate falls below this value

parameters.name: --volume-spike
parameters.description: Trigger when 24h volume exceeds this USD value

name: alerts.remove
description: Remove an alert by ID. The first 8 characters of the alert ID are sufficient.

name: alerts.check
description: Check all configured alerts against live market data and return triggered and near-trigger alerts.

parameters.name: --json
parameters.description: Output JSON array of alert check results with urgency field

name: alerts.daemon
description: Manage the background alert monitoring daemon. Polls live markets at a configurable interval and rings the terminal bell on trigger.

parameters.name: --interval
parameters.description: Poll interval in seconds (default: 30, minimum: 5). Only used with start.

name: smart.trailing
description: Set a trailing stop on an open position. Polls every 5 seconds and submits a market close when the trail distance is breached. Foreground process.

parameters.name: symbol
parameters.description: Market symbol of the open position e.g. SOL-USDC-PERP

parameters.name: --distance
parameters.description: Trail distance in percent from extreme price (0.1–50)

name: smart.list
description: List all smart orders (trailing stops) with their current status, trigger price, and extreme price.

parameters.name: --json
parameters.description: Output JSON array of smart order objects

name: smart.cancel
description: Cancel an active smart order by ID prefix. The order state is preserved; the polling loop will stop on next restart.

name: arb.scan
description: Scan all markets for funding rate arbitrage opportunities above the configured APR threshold. Optionally compares against external CEX rates.

parameters.name: --min-apr
parameters.description: Minimum annualised APR threshold to display (default: config value)

parameters.name: --json
parameters.description: Output JSON array of opportunity objects

name: arb.start
description: Start the funding rate arbitrage bot daemon. Scans for opportunities, enters positions, and manages exits according to the configured exit policy. Dangerous — places live orders. Foreground process.

parameters.name: --size
parameters.description: Position size per trade in USD (overrides config)

name: arb.stop
description: Stop the arb bot by sending SIGTERM to its PID. Open positions remain active and must be managed manually.

name: arb.status
description: Show arb bot lifetime P&L summary (funding collected, fees paid, net P&L, win rate) and active position details.

name: arb.list
description: List all arb positions with their status, entry APR, funding earned, and net P&L.

parameters.name: --status
parameters.description: Filter: active, closed, error, or all (default: all)

parameters.name: --json
parameters.description: Output JSON array of position objects

name: arb.close
description: Manually close an arb position by ID. Dangerous — submits a market order to chain.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Arb position ID from arb list

name: arb.config
description: View or update arb bot configuration. Changes are persisted to ~/.pacifica/config.json.

parameters.name: --show
parameters.description: Display current config without modifying it

parameters.name: --exit
parameters.description: Set exit policy: settlement | rate_inverted | apr_below | pnl_target

name: leaderboard
description: Live Pacifica testnet trader leaderboard with 1D/7D/30D/all-time P&L breakdown, reputation score, and win rate. Supports filtering and watch mode.

parameters.name: --limit
parameters.description: Number of traders to show (default: 10, max: 50)

parameters.name: --live
parameters.description: Fetch current open positions for top 5 traders (slower)

parameters.name: --json
parameters.description: Output JSON array of trader objects

parameters.name: --watch
parameters.description: Refresh every 30s with delta highlighting (incompatible with --json)

name: intelligence.patterns
description: Display verified market patterns from the local intelligence store, sorted by win rate.

parameters.name: --json
parameters.description: Output JSON array of pattern objects with name, win_rate, sample_size, avg_pnl_pct, verified

name: intelligence.reputation
description: Fetch live Pacifica testnet trader leaderboard enriched with local intelligence reputation scores.

parameters.name: --json
parameters.description: Output JSON array of trader objects with overall_rep_score

name: intelligence.run
description: Run the full intelligence pipeline: execute pattern engine against captured trade records, then scan live markets for active signals that match verified patterns.

parameters.name: --patterns
parameters.description: Also print the full verified pattern list

name: intelligence.me
description: Personal trading intelligence profile: reputation score, win rate, strongest market conditions, best markets, and detected personal patterns.

parameters.name: --json
parameters.description: Output JSON with full profile including personal_patterns and top_markets

name: intelligence.serve
description: Start the Intelligence REST API server. Exposes /api/v1/patterns, /api/v1/signals, /api/v1/reputation. Default port 4242.

name: watch
description: Fullscreen Ink TUI showing active intelligence signals, top funding rates, open positions, and arb bot status. Auto-refreshes every 30s. Press q to quit. Not suitable for automation.

name: copy.watch
description: Watch a trader's open positions by Solana address. Prompts to copy each opened position (or copies automatically with --auto). Dangerous with --auto. Foreground daemon.

parameters.name: address
parameters.description: Solana wallet address of the trader to watch

parameters.name: --multiplier
parameters.description: Size multiplier for copied trades (default: 1, e.g. 0.1 for 10%)

parameters.name: --auto
parameters.description: Auto-copy without confirmation prompts. Use with extreme care.

name: copy.list
description: Show recently watched trader addresses with their last-seen positions and the time they were last polled.

name: agent.status
description: Show the agent guardrail dashboard: enabled state, daily spending limit, amount spent today, remaining budget, max order size, max leverage, and allowed/blocked actions.

parameters.name: --json
parameters.description: Output JSON with all guardrail fields and recent_actions array

name: agent.stop
description: Kill switch: immediately disable agent trading by setting agent.enabled=false in config. No confirmation required.

name: agent.start
description: Re-enable agent trading. Prompts for confirmation.

name: agent.config
description: Interactive guardrail editor. Sets daily spending limit, max order size, max leverage, and confirmation threshold. Not suitable for automation.

name: agent.log
description: View the agent action audit trail with optional filters for time window, action type, and symbol.

parameters.name: --action
parameters.description: Filter by action type e.g. place_order, close_position

parameters.name: --json
parameters.description: Output JSON array of log entries
